_comment: Claim-fidelity spec for the issue skill: does a real `/charness:issue` run honor its own central claims, above all that it routes to its references at the point of need? declaredReferences is the full reference set (coverage report). referenceEngagement classifies each reference on the engage-always/on-demand/gate-sufficient axis from the locked methodology contract (charness-artifacts/spec/2026-06-23-skill-claim-fidelity-doc-philosophy.md). requiredCommandFragments are the engage-always references SKILL.md routes to in a representative run: if the run never opens one, it did not follow its own routing. thresholds are intentionally omitted until a first baseline capture sets a per-skill runtime budget. requiredCommandFragments rationale: These three govern the core workflow scaffolding: resolve-flow routes classification and sequencing, issue-shaping dictates body composition for creation, and closeout-discipline enforces the verified ledger and behavioral-verdict proof contract that closes every run.

causal-review.md.rationale: SKILL.md step 4 routes to causal-review conditionally: '`bug`: run the causal-review fresh-eye subagent before design'; the doc states 'Only `bug`-class issues require the full causal review'.
causal-review.md.trigger: When resolving bug-class issues; skipped for feature/deferred-work/question/decision-needed.

closeout-discipline.md.rationale: SKILL.md routes to closeout-discipline for 'verified ledger', 'Target Durability', and 'Per-Issue Behavioral Verdict At Close', governing the durable proof contract that applies to every issue-new and issue-resolve closeout.

issue-backend.md.rationale: SKILL.md checks `backend_ready` before acting and states 'The selected backend comes from the adapter; do not hardcode `gh`'; backend-specific operation details are consulted only when the default is overridden or broken.
issue-backend.md.trigger: When backend is not default gh, or when backend_ready is false, or when configuring adapter-resolved backends.

issue-shaping.md.rationale: SKILL.md step 2 explicitly routes to issue-shaping for 'Shape the body problem-first' on every issue-new run, governing the body structure, labels, milestones, and external-source preservation.

resolution-brief.md.rationale: SKILL.md step 6 routes to resolution-brief conditionally: 'For `feature` / `deferred-work`: emit the pre-mutation resolution brief' before design, applying only to non-bug classifications.
resolution-brief.md.trigger: When resolving feature-class or deferred-work issues; skipped for bug/question/decision-needed.

resolve-flow.md.rationale: SKILL.md routes to resolve-flow for 'resolve sequencing, GitHub source-of-truth selection, classification routing' as the governing lens that shapes steps 1-6 in any representative resolve run.
